title: Sigma
description: Sigma is a small FabricMod that focuses around Matter and Sigmas
body:
About

Sigma is a mod that adds a few (in future more) end game items:

-Matterium - changes blocks into pure matter and is crafting component

-Matter - Block that you can phase through, generates particles, can be used as decoration and lets you jump really high

-Anti Matter Has Opposite properties of Matter (Makes you jump low and run fast)

-Fusion - Has Half Properties Of Matter And Half Of Anti Matter

-Matter, Anti Matter and Fusion Chunks

-Unstable Sigma - Suprise (it's really unstable and explosive)-Gravity Sigma - let's you fly

Planned:

-Transmutation Sigma

-Other Uniqe Sigmas

How To Begin
